userMessage: Set CH1 to 50mV DC 50ohm for power rail monitoring, CH2 to 1V DC for reference clock. Set trigger on CH1 rising edge 25mV normal mode holdoff 100us. Enable average acquisition 128 waveforms. Add measurements: mean, RMS, pk2pk, high, low, positive overshoot on CH1. Add frequency on CH2. Query all results. Save CH1 waveform as CSV for post-processing and take screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request because exact verification is still missing for required SCPI details:

- trigger level on CH1 at 25 mV
- measurement source assignment for the added measurements on CH1 vs CH2

I do have verified commands for parts of the setup, including:

- `CH<x>:SCAle`

But since the missing items are necessary to make the flow correct and applyable, I’m failing closed rather than guessing.
